creator: allan@lan2wan.com
text:
Server is running mail service and has been working fine for 
several months - In the last 2 days it has stopped responding 
several times. There is no indication of why in the system logs 
that I can find. On the last reboot I stoped sendmail and was
attempting to search the logs when it stoped responding again.
This would indicate that it was not sendmail that crashed the machine.
The server is an IExtreem U-1 server purchaced from hardware.freebsd.com

How-To-Repeat: let it run
